title: Build a self-checking testbench
description: Drive the DUT and automatically compare outputs against a reference model with a scoreboard, rather than inspecting waveforms by hand.
body: Steps: 1. Instantiate the DUT and generate clock + reset. 2. Implement a golden/reference model of expected behavior. 3. Drive directed edge cases plus randomized/constrained-random stimulus. 4. Compare DUT output to the model every cycle via a scoreboard or assertions; fail loudly on mismatch. 5. Add functional coverage to know what was exercised. Rollback point: before changing the DUT interface. Validation: the scoreboard must report zero mismatches and coverage goals must be met; a waveform 'looks right' is not a pass.
